title: 273 LoRA Repos, 199K Stars, and the Quality Still Isn't There
subtitle: The fine-tuning landscape has an average quality score of 18 out of 100. We mapped the whole thing.
author: Graham Rowe
meta_description: Data-driven analysis of the LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning landscape: 273 repos with 199K stars but an average quality score of just 18/100. Quality-scored and updated daily.
